style_effects: Subtle heat haze curls from Hitmonlee's joint armor, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that cuts through the dim arena. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the light like tiny silver stars. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
